sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46991" key="h(meroqallh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμερο-θαλλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θάλλω</etym>) <sense id="n46991.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gently-sprouting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.374</biblScope> </bibl>(nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-θηλέσι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
